title: Prologue to the Legend
overview: The brave heroes pass through ancient mines guarded by a dragon.

title: Blazing Departure
overview: The story of the series begins with a goblin invasion.

title: The Black Knight
overview: War catches up to the heroes as they are mistakingly captured.

title: The Grey Witch
overview: The Grey Witch plots while the heroes brave the Forest of No Return.

title: The Desert King
overview: The Desert King hosts a banquet and gets an unexpected visitor.

title: The Sword of the Dark Emperor
overview: Aided by the Grey Witch, Emperor Beld advances his invasion across Lodoss.

title: The War of Heroes
overview: The fate of Lodoss is decided as the great kings clash swords.

title: Requiem for Warriors
overview: Our heroes confront the Grey Witch! Can they defeat her?

title: Scepter of Domination
overview: The dark wizard's agenda is revealed and Deedlit is in danger.

title: Demon Dragon of Fire Dragon Mountain
overview: Our heroes challenge the Demon Dragon of Fire Dragon Mountain!

title: The Wizard's Ambition
overview: The dark wizard comes for Deedlit. What does he want with her?

title: Final Battle! Marmo, the Dark Island
overview: The climax begins as our heroes head for the dark island of Marmo.

title: Lodoss, the Burning Continent
overview: The exciting conclusion! Can Parn save Deedlit and bring peace to Lodoss?
